option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Excel Export Feature - Project Plan
## 1. Subject & Overview
**Feature Name**: Data Archive & Excel Export **Purpose**: Enable users to export all registered file records from the application into an Excel spreadsheet for backup and archival purposes.
**Why**: Your application is 100% offline and stores data on the phone. There's a risk of data loss due to: - Phone storage issues - App uninstall/update - Corrupted database
This feature allows users to periodically backup all their records as Excel files for safekeeping.
---
## 2. Target & Goals
### Primary Goal Create a one-click "Export to Excel" feature in Settings that generates a downloadable Excel file containing all registered records.
### Success Criteria ✅ All records are exported (not just attachments - data only) ✅ Excel file contains exactly these fields (with Arabic headers): - عاجل أو عادي (Urgency) - الرقم التسلسلي الأصلي (Original Serial - Government) - تاريخ استلام الوثيقة من حكومة (Date Received from Government) - الرقم التسلسلي الداخلي (Internal Serial) - تاريخ استلام الوثيقة إلى مصلحة التسليم (Date Delivered to Domain) - تاريخ تسجيل في التطبيق (Registration Date in App) - اسم المستلم (Recipient Name) - المصدر (Source) - الموضوع (Subject) - المصلحة المستهدفة (Target Sector) - ملاحظات المدير (Manager Notes)
✅ File is saved to Downloads folder ✅ User gets feedback (loading, success, error) ✅ File can be shared (email, drive, etc.) ✅ Works on Android 8+ (SDK 26+)
---
## 3. What We Will Do
### A. Add Dependency Add **Apache POI** library to `build.gradle.kts` for Excel file creation.
### B. Create ExcelExporter Utility New file: `data/ExcelExporter.kt` - Takes a list of `FileRecord` objects - Converts to Excel workbook - Adds Arabic headers - Formats columns (dates, text, urgency) - Returns file path after saving
### C. Create Export ViewModel New file: `ui/viewmodel/ExportViewModel.kt` - Manages export state (idle, loading, success, error) - Handles file permissions - Triggers export in background thread - Emits success/error messages to UI
### D. Update Settings Screen Modify: `ui/screens/SettingsScreen.kt` - Add "Export to Excel" button in "Data & Storage" section - Show loading indicator during export - Display success message with file location - Offer "Share" and "Done" options
### E. Add String Resources Update: `res/values/strings.xml` and `res/values-ar/strings.xml` - "Export to Excel" - "Exporting..." - "Export successful" - Export error messages
### F. Add File Permission Update: `AndroidManifest.xml` - Add `READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` (if needed for Android 10+) - `MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` for scoped storage (Android 11+)
---
## 4. How We Will Do It
### Technical Architecture
``` ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ SettingsScreen (UI) │ │ [Export to Excel Button] │ └────────────────┬────────────────────────────┘ │ ↓ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ ExportViewModel │ │ - Manages Loading/Success/Error state │ │ - Handles permissions │ │ - Launches background export job │ └────────────────┬────────────────────────────┘ │ ↓ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ ExcelExporter (Utility) │ │ - Reads FileRecord list │ │ - Creates XSSFWorkbook (POI) │ │ - Adds headers (Arabic) │ │ - Fills data rows │ │ - Formats columns │ │ - Saves to Downloads/ │ │ FillTracking_Archive_2026-04-28.xlsx │ └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘ ```
### Step-by-Step Implementation
#### Step 1: Add Dependency ```gradle // In app/build.gradle.kts dependencies section implementation("org.apache.poi:poi-ooxml:5.2.4") implementation("org.apache.poi:poi:5.2.4") ```
#### Step 2: Create ExcelExporter.kt ```kotlin Location: app/src/main/java/com/example/filltracking2/data/ExcelExporter.kt
Functionality: - fun exportToExcel(records: List<FileRecord>, context: Context): String? Takes records → Creates Excel → Saves file → Returns file path
- Adds all required columns with Arabic headers - Formats dates in "yyyy-MM-dd" format - Sets column widths for readability - Adds bold header row ```
#### Step 3: Create ExportViewModel.kt ```kotlin Location: app/src/main/java/com/example/filltracking2/ui/viewmodel/ExportViewModel.kt
State Flows: - exportState: StateFlow<ExportState> (Idle/Loading/Success/Error) - successMessage: StateFlow<String?> - errorMessage: StateFlow<String?>
Functions: - fun exportRecords(records: List<FileRecord>, context: Context) Launches coroutine to export and update state ```
#### Step 4: Update SettingsScreen.kt Add to "Data & Storage" section: ```kotlin // Add Export button with loading indicator SettingsItem( icon = Icons.Default.Download, title = "Export to Excel", onClick = { triggerExport() } )
// Show loading dialog when exporting if (exportState is Loading) { CircularProgressIndicator() Text("Exporting records...") }
// Show success message if (exportState is Success) { AlertDialog( title = "Export Complete", text = "File saved: ${filePath}", confirmButton = { Share / Done } ) } ```
#### Step 5: Add Strings ```xml <!-- strings.xml (English) --> <string name="export_excel">Export to Excel</string> <string name="exporting">Exporting your records...</string> <string name="export_success">Records exported successfully!</string> <string name="export_error">Failed to export records</string> <string name="export_location">Saved to: Downloads/FillTracking_Archive_DATE.xlsx</string>
<!-- strings-ar.xml (Arabic) --> <string name="export_excel">تصدير إلى Excel</string> <string name="exporting">جاري تصدير السجلات...</string> <string name="export_success">تم تصدير السجلات بنجاح!</string> <string name="export_error">فشل التصدير</string> <string name="export_location">تم الحفظ في: Downloads/FillTracking_Archive_DATE.xlsx</string> ```
#### Step 6: Update AndroidManifest.xml ```xml <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" /> ```
---
## 5. Data Flow & User Journey
### User Flow ``` 1. User opens Settings Screen 2. User sees "Export to Excel" button in Data & Storage section 3. User taps the button 4. [Loading indicator appears] 5. App reads all records from FileRecordRepository.recordsFlow 6. ExcelExporter creates workbook: - Header row (Arabic labels) - 1 row per FileRecord - Format dates, urgency, etc. 7. File saved: ~/Downloads/FillTracking_Archive_2026-04-28.xlsx 8. [Loading disappears, Success dialog appears] 9. User sees: "Export successful!" Options: [Share] [Open] [Done] 10. User can share via Email, Google Drive, Bluetooth, etc. ```
### Excel File Structure ``` Column A: عاجل أو عادي (Urgency) Column B: الرقم التسلسلي الأصلي (Original Serial) Column C: تاريخ استلام الوثيقة من حكومة (Date Received from Gov) Column D: الرقم التسلسلي الداخلي (Internal Serial) Column E: تاريخ استلام الوثيقة إلى مصلحة التسليم (Date Delivered) Column F: تاريخ تسجيل في التطبيق (Registration Date) Column G: اسم المستلم (Recipient Name) Column H: المصدر (Source) Column I: الموضوع (Subject) Column J: المصلحة المستهدفة (Target Sector) Column K: ملاحظات المدير (Manager Notes)
Row 1: Headers (bold, background color) Rows 2–N: Data (one record per row) ```
---
## 6. File Locations to Create/Modify
### New Files - `app/src/main/java/com/example/filltracking2/data/ExcelExporter.kt` - `app/src/main/java/com/example/filltracking2/ui/viewmodel/ExportViewModel.kt`
### Modified Files - `app/build.gradle.kts` (add POI dependency) - `app/src/main/java/com/example/filltracking2/ui/screens/SettingsScreen.kt` (add button) - `app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` (add permissions) - `app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml` (add English strings) - `app/src/main/res/values-ar/strings.xml` (add Arabic strings)
---
## 7. Technical Considerations
### Excel Library: Apache POI - **Why**: Industry-standard, fully-featured, supports XLSX format - **Version**: 5.2.4 (stable, supports modern Android) - **File Size Impact**: ~3-4 MB added to APK (acceptable)
### File Saving Strategy - **Location**: `context.getExternalFilesDir(Environment.DIRECTORY_DOWNLOADS)` - **Why**: No permission headaches, app-specific, auto-cleanup if app uninstalled - **File Format**: XLSX (Excel 2007+, widely compatible) - **Naming**: `FillTracking_Archive_YYYY-MM-DD_HHmmss.xlsx`
### Permissions - **Android 6-9**: Requires `WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` - **Android 10+**: Scoped storage, no broad permission needed for app-specific directories - **Android 11+**: `MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` only if accessing arbitrary files
### Performance - Exporting 1,000 records: ~2-3 seconds - File size: ~500 records = ~300 KB - Runs on IO thread to prevent UI freezing
### Error Handling - Disk full: Show user-friendly error - Permission denied: Guide user to settings - Empty records: Show "No records to export" - Invalid data: Skip and log
---
## 8. Testing Checklist
- [ ] Export works with 0 records (empty file with headers only) - [ ] Export works with 1 record - [ ] Export works with 100+ records - [ ] Arabic characters display correctly in Excel - [ ] Dates format correctly - [ ] Urgency values are correct - [ ] File is saved to correct location - [ ] File can be opened in Excel/LibreOffice/Google Sheets - [ ] Share functionality works (email, drive, etc.) - [ ] Works on Android 8, 10, 12, 14
---
## 9. Timeline & Effort
- **ExcelExporter.kt**: 30 min - **ExportViewModel.kt**: 20 min - **SettingsScreen update**: 15 min - **Dependencies & permissions**: 10 min - **String resources**: 10 min - **Testing**: 20 min
**Total**: ~2 hours
---
## 10. Future Enhancements (Not in Scope)
- Scheduled auto-export - Cloud sync (Google Drive, OneDrive) - CSV export option - PDF report generation - Encryption for exported files - Attach Excel to email automatically
---
**Status**: Ready for Implementation ✅
